nasb.text: They said to him, “In Bethlehem of Judea; for this is what has been written by the prophet:

esv.text: They told him, “In Bethlehem of Judea, for so it is written by the prophet:

cnv.text: 他們回答：“在猶太的伯利恆。因為有先知在經上這樣說：

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“在犹太的伯利恒，因为先知这样记载，

csbs.text: 他们对希律说：“在犹太的伯利恒，因为藉着先知有这样的记载：
